title: 3D Crossbow
description: A high-quality 3D crossbow texture that adds realism, depth, and style to Minecraft combat.
body:
The 3D Crossbow texture pack upgrades the standard crossbow with a fully modeled 3D design, adding depth, realism, and mechanical detail. The crossbow features clean geometry and smooth textures that make it look more dynamic and powerful while remaining clear and easy to recognize during combat.

Designed to blend seamlessly with Minecraft’s vanilla style, this texture enhances both PvP and survival gameplay without impacting performance. It’s ideal for players who want a more immersive ranged-combat experience with high-quality visuals.

Features

Fully modeled 3D crossbow design

Enhanced depth and realistic mechanical details

Clear visibility during PvP combat

Vanilla-friendly visual style

Performance-optimized and lightweight

Suitable for survival, PvP, and multiplayer servers
